Windows.name: Windows
Windows.requirements: Windows 10 (version 1607) or newer (Intel or AMD processors only)
Windows.items_added:
(Filters) Add filter for  Atmos (PM-5173)
(Filters) Add filter for audio layout (PM-5118)
(Filters) Add filters for video, audio, and subtitle codecs (PM-5117)
(Metadata) Add support for RottenTomatoes audience and average ratings to Nfo parser (PM-5176)
(Metadata) Detect Dolby Atmos (PM-4004)
(Metadata) Read 'set' tags for collections in the NFO parser (PM-4849)
(QNAP) Generate unsigned QNAP packages (PM-5150)
(Shield) Added server management screen (PM-2736)
Windows.items_fixed:
(Hubs) Related collection hubs are not respecting label restrictions (PM-5174)
(MKV) Correctly handle the LANGUAGEBCP47 tag (PM-3888)
(Metadata) Concatenate multiple artist names for track artists in m4a files (PM-5169)
(Metadata) Correctly detect 7.1 channel eac3 (PM-4179)
(Metadata) NFO parser was not fetching value for studio (PM-4943)
(Metadata) NFO parser would omit episodes with leading zeroes in the episode field (PM-5168)
(Metadata) Support for multiple genre and release type tags for mp4/m4a and mov formats  (PM-3362)
(Network) Enforce TLS certificate verification on all retries; this addresses CVE-2026-42619 (PM-5268)
(Transcoding) Addressed issues hw tonemapping on linux using an tiger lake and rocket lake igpus (PM-5197)
(Transcoding) Addressed issues hw transcoding on linux using an arrow lake igpu (PM-5197)
